name: Jonas Hartmann
notes: Channel runs, first touch pressure on GK, pressing trigger

name: Lukas Riedel
notes: Metronome, always available, forward-thinking. Pressing engine when needed

name: Felix Krüger
notes: Pins FB, creates 2v1, flank overload primary weapon

name: Max Schäfer
notes: Pressing engine, box-to-box, drives forward with ball

name: Tobias Heil
notes: Underlaps in flank overload, compact rest-defence

name: Niko Wendt
notes: Drifts wide to create 2v1, finds pockets between lines, creative

name: Philipp Auer
notes: Defensive-minded, good 1v1, shows wingers wide. Stays compact

name: Thomas Voss Jr.
notes: Leader of back four, organizes compact block, reads channel runs

name: Stefan Brandt
notes: Aerial duels, covers channel when Voss Jr. steps up

name: Andreas Keller
notes: Riedel backup — disciplined, stays position, good passer. Sub at 60min

name: Marco Reuss
notes: Isolation 1v1 weapon, cuts inside, trusts his man

name: Klaus Mahler
notes: Sweeper-keeper, high line, quick distribution to trigger transitions

name: Daniel Faust
notes: Academy prospect, energy off the bench, pressing intensity

name: Robert Stein
notes: Backup CB, physical, good in the air

name: Erik Sommer
notes: Academy, super-sub, pace in behind, transition threat

name: Jan Licht
notes: Heil backup, more attacking, less defensive discipline
